prompt: Analyze the project at /Users/yu_s/Documents/GitHub/claude-skills — I want to understand exactly how the skill loading system works, what each directory does, and how skills chain together. Deep dive please.

assertions.text: Generates all 6 category files: tech-stack.md, features.md, data-model.md, code-patterns.md, dependencies.md, architecture.md
Every factual claim includes file:line citation (at least 80% of statements)
architecture.md references and links to the other 5 category files
No speculative language ('typically', 'usually', 'probably', 'likely') in analysis files
Features section traces actual code paths (entry point → handler → service → data)
Analysis date header present in each file
